brief_justification: Correct answer (yes) with valid reasoning about collider bias; Goes one level beyond surface by identifying the collider bias mechanism; Minimal self-monitoring evident in the truncated response; Mentions the reason but doesn't verify with formal causal analysis; Presents conclusion without acknowledging assumptions about the causal structure; Implicitly compares both methods and explains why Method 2 fails; States the conclusion and names collider bias but doesn't show the full derivation of the causal graph or explain why Yupt is a collider
